receiver_kinds.description: Deterministic planetary illumination receiver kind for SOL-1 geometry.

stability.rationale: SOL-1 emitter and receiver kind semantics remain provisional until multi-star and eclipse semantics are contract-pinned.
stability.replacement_target: Replace SOL-1 kind stubs with contract-pinned astrophysical body-role semantics.
